notes:
{"notes":"

⚠️ Breaking changes

  • Spaces configuration and custom vocabulary data formats have changed. You will need to re-add your spaces. This is a one-time migration — future updates will preserve your data.

What's new

  • Source code files (.rs, .py, .js, .ts, .go, etc.) are now indexed with a dedicated pipeline — smarter tokenization for programming languages.
  • CamelCase, snake_case, and kebab-case identifiers are now split into searchable parts while preserving the full compound (e.g. UpdateStreamProcessor → update, stream, processor).
  • Significantly faster loading of custom vocabulary (zero-copy deserialization).

Thank you for the continued support and feedback!

"}
